text:
Created attachment 259432
Patch to fix build on Poudriere (Makefile part only)

Patch to fix build on Poudriere (Makefile part only).
This patch alone is insufficient and needs Piotr's pkg-plist fix, too.

As I already have devel/appstream installed, cannot confirm that adding it to RUN_DEPENDS, too, or not. And feel free to sort BUILD_DEPENDS on committing.
